analyst_notes: Synthetic example drawn from deck live-rating sample.

dimension_scores.rationale: Category (foodservice distribution) stable; restaurant clients migrating to direct-supplier AI platforms but most SMB customers still need human-led rep model.
Independent restaurant operators — softening demographic. SMB death rate rising under margin pressure.
Upstream producers increasingly AI-mediated ordering; downstream ops partially automated.
Sysco, US Foods investing in AI-driven customer platforms — replication pressure rising.
Logistics + supplier network is genuinely hard to replicate; rep relationships are not.
Heavy sales-rep headcount; AI-led ordering erodes this role.
Margin on SKU-level distribution susceptible to marketplace compression.
Modern ERP, some ML in demand forecasting.
Leadership aware; published AI strategy language but no shipped product.
Listed company, slow governance cycle for pivots.
Zero evidence of AI-native client onboarding or agent-facing API surface.
Warehouse + fleet footprint is moat; brand + data are not.

positions.rationale: End diners unchanged; they still eat at restaurants.
